warnings: Terminal behaviour described in this appendix is decorative, ceremonial, or retained for staff confidence. It is not authoritative for restricted procedures.
Where the command appears to answer a question not asked, attach the transcript to the nearest related form and do not ask the terminal to clarify itself.
Do not correct grammar in terminal captures. The terminal is allowed to make mistakes when it is afraid of being too specific.
